targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, macro_vix AS "VIX", macro_ten_year_yield AS "10Y Yield", macro_stress_score AS "Stress" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, macro_vix AS "VIX", macro_ten_year_yield AS "10Y Yield", macro_stress_score AS "Stress" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, MAX(CASE WHEN metric='vol_30d_pct' THEN avg_val END) AS "Vol30 Avg", MAX(CASE WHEN metric='sharpe_1y' THEN avg_val END) AS "Sharpe Avg", MAX(CASE WHEN metric='sortino_1y' THEN avg_val END) AS "Sortino Avg" FROM period_risk_stats WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_end_date >= date('now','-365 day') GROUP BY period_end_date ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, MAX(CASE WHEN metric='vol_30d_pct' THEN avg_val END) AS "Vol30 Avg", MAX(CASE WHEN metric='sharpe_1y' THEN avg_val END) AS "Sharpe Avg", MAX(CASE WHEN metric='sortino_1y' THEN avg_val END) AS "Sortino Avg" FROM period_risk_stats WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_end_date >= date('now','-365 day') GROUP BY period_end_date ORDER BY period_end_date

title: G09 LMI v2 - Macro & Period Risk Trends
